1.3 
 
                                                      Page 2/ 27 
CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.   
The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the reason for updating the document. Column 5 should include the names of the author(s) 
doing the changes. Including the name in column 6 shows that the document has been validated by the 
TAC/MFC PQ leader or deputy (or TAC/MFC PQ leader or the deputy). This validation means the docu-
ment was checked for contents, formats and consistency with other documents. 
 
Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Description 
AMSR2 JAXA MWR 
ESA European Space Agency 
FMI Finnish Meteorological Institute 
JAXA Japanese Space Agency 
MWR Microwave radiometer 
MY Multi-year 
NRT Near Real Time 
RCM (1/2/3) Canadian Radarsat Contellation Mission C-band SAR 
RS-2 Canadian Radarsat-2 C-band SAR 
SAR Synthetic aperture Radar 
S-1(A/B/C/D) ESA Sentinel-1 C-band SAR 
SIC Sea ice concentration (=sea ice fraction) 
SID Sea ice drift 
SIE Sea ice extent 
SIT Sea ice thickness 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
L1D Average of the absolute difference between estimate and reference val-
ues. Used in the quality validation. 
Bias Average of the  difference between the estimate and reference values. 
Used in the quality validation. 
RMSD Root-Mean Squared Difference  between the estimate and reference 
values. Used in the quality validation.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a technical note for sea ice products from the Finnish Meteorological Institute, detailing changes and updates to quality information documents (QuIDs) for near real-time observations of sea ice extent, concentration, and thickness.

product_line.name: Sea Ice Near Real Time Observations
